title: Describe a simple chart
subtitle: Talk about numbers carefully.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: The chart shows that more people use the bus in the morning.
图表显示更多人在早上坐公交。
The number goes up after seven o’clock.
It shows that more people use the bus in the morning.
它显示更多人在早上坐公交。

items.en: The chart shows that more people use the bus in the morning.
items.zh: 图表显示更多人在早上坐公交。

items.en: The number goes up after seven o’clock.
It shows that more people use the bus in the morning.
items.zh: 它显示更多人在早上坐公交。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It shows that more people use the bus in the morning.
lines.zh: 它显示更多人在早上坐公交。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The number goes up after seven o’clock.

items.en: The chart shows that more people use the bus in the morning.
items.zh: 图表显示更多人在早上坐公交。

items.en: The number goes up after seven o’clock.
Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
